rewrite.text:
PROVE ex1 : forall n : nat, n + 0 = n.
BEGIN
  ASSUME n : nat.
  ASSUME 0 : nat.
  ASSUME m : nat.
  ASSUME m + 0 = m.
  ASSUME n = S m.
  SIMPLIFY n + 0
  = n + 0 [BY n + 0 definition]
  SIMPLIFY n + 0
  = n [BY reflexivity]
  THEREFORE n + 0 = n.
  CONCLUDE: For all natural numbers n, n + 0 = n [QED]
END
